rules: User descriptions and user tags must be shown before extracted text in resource briefs.
If user evidence conflicts with AI/extractor evidence, preserve the conflict and ask for review instead of silently overriding the user.
A user-pinned exclusion can only be violated if the user explicitly asks to reconsider it.
Transcript-based classifications require transcript artifact evidence refs.
Title-only classifications should not be strong includes unless the command is title/URL-oriented.
